steps.title: Use the final sentence
steps.content: The passage says proximity alone cannot explain the difference in park use. Mexico City residents reported using parks more even though fewer reported living within a 10-minute walk of a park.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A raises survey inaccuracies that the text never mentions. Choice B invents researcher expectations, and Choice D invents older sources. The text's actual point is that some factor besides proximity must explain the difference. The answer is C.
